disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness/swelling focal to the lid margin (not diffuse whole-lid/periorbital), no pain on eye movement, no double vision, no proptosis, vision normal
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness just at the lump on the lid edge, or spreading across the whole eyelid/cheek?
Any double vision, pain moving the eye, or the eye bulging?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just at the lump on the lid edge; the whole eyelid and cheek aren't red, no double vision, and moving the eye doesn't hurt.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever/systemic illness; eye itself (conjunctiva/cornea) not red or painful beyond the lid lump
trigger_question_examples: Is the white of the eye red or the eye itself painful, apart from the lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, and the eye itself isn't red — it's the lid lump that hurts.
